story: As a new visitor, I want to create an account so that I can have a personalized shopping experience.

cases.title: Successful User Signup
steps: Click the Sign Up button in the navigation bar
Verify the auth modal is visible with the Sign Up tab active
Enter the new user's name in the Full Name field
Enter the new user's email in the Email field
Enter the new user's password in the Password field
Click the Create Account button
assertions: Verify the success message '✓ Account created! Signing you in…' is displayed
Verify the user chip is visible with the new user's first name
Verify the Login/Sign Up buttons are not visible

cases.title: Signup with Empty Fields
steps: Click the Sign Up button in the navigation bar
Verify the auth modal is visible with the Sign Up tab active
Leave the Full Name field empty
Enter the new user's email in the Email field
Enter the new user's password in the Password field
Click the Create Account button
assertions: Verify the error message 'Please fill in all fields.' is displayed

cases.title: Signup with Invalid Email
steps: Click the Sign Up button in the navigation bar
Verify the auth modal is visible with the Sign Up tab active
Enter the invalid email user's name in the Full Name field
Enter the invalid email in the Email field
Enter the invalid email user's password in the Password field
Click the Create Account button
assertions: Verify the error message 'Invalid email address.' is displayed

cases.title: Signup with Short Password
steps: Click the Sign Up button in the navigation bar
Verify the auth modal is visible with the Sign Up tab active
Enter the short password user's name in the Full Name field
Enter the short password user's email in the Email field
Enter the short password in the Password field
Click the Create Account button
assertions: Verify the error message 'Password must be at least 6 characters.' is displayed

cases.title: Signup with Duplicate Account
steps: Click the Sign Up button in the navigation bar
Verify the auth modal is visible with the Sign Up tab active
Enter the existing user's name in the Full Name field
Enter the existing user's email in the Email field
Enter the existing user's password in the Password field
Click the Create Account button
assertions: Verify the error message 'Account already exists. Try logging in.' is displayed
